questions.question: Explain the principle of Abstraction in software engineering, providing one example of how it is applied in a real-world scenario.
questions.hint: Focus on its benefits and relevance to software engineering

questions.question: Describe the concept of Separation of Concerns (SoC) and its importance in software design. Provide an example of how it is applied in a real-world system.
questions.hint: Emphasize the benefits of SoC and its impact on maintainability

questions.question: State the principle of Don't Repeat Yourself (DRY) and explain its significance in software engineering. Provide an example of how it is applied in a real-world codebase.
questions.hint: Focus on its benefits and common pitfalls
